subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average time complexity of Insertion Sort:
explanation: Insertion Sort average: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of Insertion Sort:
explanation: Best case: O(n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Worst case of Insertion Sort:
explanation: Worst case: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Space complexity of Insertion Sort:
explanation: Space: O(1).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Insertion Sort is stable:
explanation: Stable — equal elements maintain relative order is preserved.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Insertion Sort is in-place:
explanation: In-place: only O(1) extra memory.
